Issue Summary: Logmate invitation link expires after 7 days; some drivers miss initial email. Also tag 'logmate_registered' delay exceeds 24hr SLA after driver accepts invite.
DL rejected due to name mismatch - appears to be a tools issue as name matches POID and sheet. Multiple samples collected.
Repeated vehicle rejections - ANCAP automation issue. BYD Sealion 7 and Great Wall Haval H7 affected. Exempt tags added but ancap_reject reapplied by automation.
DPs unable to go online - accounts placed on WAR with blocker OUTSIDE_EARNABLE_AREA / FULLY_OUTSIDE_EARNABLE_AREA.
AAE custom blocker - need confirmation it is live before waitlisting 70k drivers. Risk of driver confusion and supply loss.
DSE option not visible in Bonjour/app for some DPs. Web link also not working. 8 sample DPs, 7 resolved via Messaging queue workaround.
NZTA compliance process outage - NZ drivers receiving Uber comms about DL/P endorsement issues but NZTA confirms no issue on their end.
TSL sheet not updated post 2 April - multiple drivers awaiting TSL update. No entries found on sheet after that date.
Drivers unable to upload stickers in-app. Manual support uploads disabled (fraud prevention), leaving DPs with no workaround.
Uber Sticker submission stuck in 'Pending' transcription for 2-3 days - delay on DA side.
60+ driver inbounds in one day from drivers waitlisted due to not completing assistance animal education. Reactivation not instant after course completion as expected.
Resolution: Eng confirmed evaluation issue resolved; configuration updated

Issue Summary: NT drivers unable to upload Vehicle Registration in-app. Supports uploading on their behalf as workaround. Issue appears NT-specific.
30+ NZ and SYD drivers unable to go online after receiving message about not being signed up to earn in location.
L5 data outage impacted driver compliance processes - queue spikes. Eng working on fix with no ETA.
Logmate tagging delayed/missing for C2D driver - case unresolved for ~2 weeks despite TSL re-upload and approval. Multiple similar cases.
NZ fatigue education - ucraft issue this morning failed to display education screen. Drivers unable to see screen and contacting support.
Resolution: uCraft issue resolved - drivers can see screen after re-login or app refresh

Issue Summary: Logmate access outage - COE team unable to log into Logmate. Possible outage or maintenance window.
DL incorrectly rejected with name mismatch reason by tool - DA team confirmed doc approved but tool incorrectly rejected. Multiple samples.
Incorrect rejection of Driver's Licence - 50+ cases where DLs rejected due to name mismatch with National ID/VEVO. Auto transcription rule failing on letter case inconsistency.
Resolution: ID Ops flagged to Doc Eng for root cause fix

Issue Summary: Active drivers blocked by OUTSIDE_EARNABLE_AREA / FULLY_OUTSIDE_EARNABLE_AREA - ~20 calls from drivers moved to WAR status. Part of ongoing global outage.
Education modules not visible in app for C2D drivers - Driver Safety Education and Interpersonal Conflict Training not showing in-app. Config error identified; fix not yet deployed.
Resolution: Config error identified; fix pending tooling outage resolution

Issue Summary: Spike in driver inflows due to delayed payout for DxGy promos.
ENFORCER_DEAD_SUPPLY blocking eligible DPs for more than 24 hours - Assistance Animal RGO latency causing DPs with complete requirements to still be blocked.
Phone OUs outage - calls not landing. Started ~6AM IST, resolved ~8AM IST. Peak 100+ waiting calls across all OUs/LOBs.
NZTA Process Outage - Ops mishandle in NZTA compliance process incorrectly waitlisted eligible NZ drivers. FNL email queue spiked to 200+.
Bliss outage - agents unable to attach trips to contacts across all OUs/LOBs.
BUG: 15k expired docs auto-fetched by Eng bug - remediation will cause spike in inflows as affected drivers get waitlisted. ~15k docs impacted in Mobility.
NT drivers unable to upload vehicle regos in-app due to configuration error. Agents manually uploaded docs as workaround.
Resolution: CoreOps fixed config error after escalation

Issue Summary: ANZ DFR spike - 5bps spike in defect rate in one week, +12bps over 2 weeks. Mostly from automations, S4 spike under investigation.
Resolution: Under investigation by CX and PIR teams

Issue Summary: Cash canary launch (AU: Launceston, Bunbury; NZ: New Plymouth) - cash trips now available in 3 cities. Expect inflows from drivers/riders on cash trip process.
Driver L2 backlog of 1,700 tickets flagged. Potential SLA impact.
Assistance Animal issues - ongoing concerns raised about AAE go-online blockers and whether issues are normalising as expected post-outage.
NOVA v3.1 ticket scrubbing session needed - request to organise session with Ops, Mobility CX, Driver Growth and PIR teams end June/early July.
Scammer calls to drivers - drivers being called by scammers pretending to be Uber Support. Online chatter increasing.
DFR spike follow-up - Fare Disputes DR climbing +3bps (0.87%->0.90%) driven by DFR v7 S4 automation.
